Dear Dr. Tan Wei Ming,

We are pleased to extend to you an offer of employment with Apex Innovations Pte Ltd as a Senior Research Analyst. Your starting salary will be SGD 8,500 per month, payable on the last working day of each month. You will report directly to Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, Head of Research, starting from 1st November 2023.

Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing and returning this letter by 15th October 2023. Should you have any questions, feel free to contact us at +65 6123 4567 or email hr@apex.sg.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

Sincerely,

Ramasamy Muthu  
Director, Human Resources  
Apex Innovations Pte Ltd
